case_title: BENJAMIN JACOBS ET AL VS. KUNXIANG QI

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-20-2024 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-20-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-20-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFFS BENJAMIN JACOBS AND ISABELLE NGUYEN ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT KUNXIANF QI IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACOBS, BENJAMIN NGUYEN, ISABELLE AS TO DEFENDANT QI, KUNXIANG
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $50. SERVED OCT-10-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT QI, KUNXIANG

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JACOBS, BENJAMIN NGUYEN, ISABELLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QI, KUNXIANG $1,131.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,231.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,156.00 FILED BY JACOBS, BENJAMIN NGUYEN, ISABELLE AS TO DEFENDANT QI, KUNXIANG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-20-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-03-2025 ORDERED DESTROYED
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY JACOBS, BENJAMIN NGUYEN, ISABELLE QI, KUNXIANG
